column1: What is the primary function of the CourtReserve (CR) software?
column2: It provides court reservation and club management tools for facilities.

column1: In the context of training, what is a 'Sandbox' or 'Test Account'?
column2: A free trial organization used by employees to practice features and build a playground for demos.

column1: What internal backend tool allows the team to access any customer's account for support?
column2: SuperAdmin

column1: Which tool serves as the live chat, ticketing system, and phone system for customer support?
column2: Intercom

column1: What is the name of the AI chatbot within Intercom that handles tier-1 questions?
column2: FIN (also known as Rally)

column1: Which tool is used as the CRM to track leads, pipeline, and call notes?
column2: Close

column1: What is the purpose of the 'Mastering the Basics' (MTB) webinar?
column2: It is a live group training required for new customers before they move to deeper onboarding.

column1: How long is a standard Advanced Setup Call (ASC)?
column2: 60 minutes

column1: Which team is responsible for guiding paying customers through their first 30 days?
column2: The Onboarding (ONB) team

column1: What is the role of an Account Executive (AE) at CourtReserve?
column2: They handle the sales pipeline, run PO calls, and nurture leads until they subscribe.

column1: Which third-party rating system is integrated with CourtReserve specifically for pickleball?
column2: DUPR (Dynamic Universal Pickleball Rating)

column1: What does the 'HOO' setting define in the platform?
column2: Hours of Operation (when courts are open for booking)

column1: What is 'SafeSave' within the CourtReserve ecosystem?
column2: The default integrated payment processor.

column1: Which tool do customers use to schedule calls with the CourtReserve team?
column2: Calendly

column1: What is the purpose of using 'Fathom' during Zoom calls?
column2: It is used for call recording and AI-generated note-taking.

column1: Which platform is used for email delivery and checked when customers report missing emails?
column2: Sendgrid

column1: What is a 'Dev Task'?
column2: A request to the development team for actions that cannot be performed through the user interface.

column1: What defines the 'Enterprise' plan tier?
column2: It is the highest tier for clubs managing multiple locations under a single account.

column1: Where should a Customer Success Advocate route an Intercom chat if the user is a prospect?
column2: To the Sales/AE team via the #hot-leads Slack channel.

column1: What is the mandatory Slack etiquette when starting and ending a shift?
column2: Posting 'Good morning' at the start and 'Goodbye' when leaving.

column1: What must be included when asking for ticket help in the #cs-questions Slack channel?
column2: The Intercom ticket URL

column1: What core functionality do 'Memberships' control in CourtReserve?
column2: Player access, including what they can book and what they are charged.

column1: What are the three different permission levels/types for 'System Users'?
column2: Admin, Sub-Admin, and Event Coordinator.

column1: What is the difference between a standard Scheduler and a Custom Scheduler?
column2: Custom Schedulers group specific courts into separate views (e.g., only tennis courts).

column1: How do 'Events' differ from standard 'Reservations'?
column2: Events are structured programs with registration, waitlists, and capacity limits.

column1: What is the 'Member Portal'?
column2: The customer-facing website where members sign up, book courts, and view events.

column1: What are the three required fields for a Member List Import?
column2: First Name, Last Name, and Username.

column1: In a Member List Import, how should Individual and Family members be organized?
column2: They must be placed on separate sheets.

column1: What is the default integrated payment processor for CourtReserve?
column2: SafeSave

column1: What is the function of 'Packages' in CourtReserve?
column2: They act as virtual punch cards for court time, lessons, or events.

column1: In the Audit Log, what can an administrator track?
column2: Changes made by specific users within a specific date range, such as reservation creations.

column1: What are 'Widgets' in the context of CourtReserve?
column2: Embeddable code snippets that allow visitors to sign up or book courts on a club's external website.

column1: What is the monthly cost for the 'Seasonal' pricing option?
column2: $49 per month (admin access only).

column1: What is the cost per location for the Enterprise Plan?
column2: $549 per month.

column1: What is the standard response SLA for the 'Launch' plan?
column2: 24 hours

column1: What is the premium response SLA for the 'Momentum' and 'Enterprise' plans?
column2: 4 hours

column1: How much is the one-time fee for a Branded Mobile App?
What is the difference between Static and Dynamic Member Groups?
column2: Static groups require manual member addition, while Dynamic groups auto-add members based on rules.

column1: Which Slack channel is used to monitor critical system alerts constantly?
column2: #cs-alerts

column1: What are 'Prime Times' in the booking settings?
column2: Configured peak hours that can have different costs or restrictions.

column1: In the Close CRM, what does the 'Won' status indicate for a lead?
column2: The lead has subscribed and is handed off to Onboarding.

column1: What is the purpose of the 'Check-In Kiosk' add-on?
column2: It provides a dedicated view for members to check into the facility upon arrival.

column1: Which tool is used for recording short video replies or tutorials for customers?
column2: Loom
